# Clipboard History

> Free, open-source clipboard manager for Mac — recalls any text, link, image, or file you've ever copied with Shift+Command+V. Works offline. Skips passwords automatically.

## Docs

- [Home](https://clipboard-history.cc/) — product overview, features, and FAQ
- [Features](https://clipboard-history.cc/#features) — full list of capabilities
- [FAQ](https://clipboard-history.cc/#faq) — common questions about privacy, compatibility, and cost

## Download

- [Download](https://clipboard-history.cc/#download) — free download for macOS 14 (Sonoma) or later
- [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/gug007/clipboard-history/releases) — all release builds and changelogs

## Source

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/gug007/clipboard-history) — open-source code, issues, and contributions
